case_title: LANGHORNE TAMARA DBA TL DESIGNS VS BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY LANGHORNE TAMARA DBA TL DESIGNS AS TO DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS HEARING SET FOR MAR-23-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANGHORNE TAMARA DBA TL DESIGNS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $629.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF MAR-23-1992, DENIED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $627.50 AS TO DEFENDANT BARTHOLOMEW ANDREW DBA GUIDELINE PUBLICATIONS
